节点.功能描述: systemPasteboard
Indicates the maximum number of records allowed in a PasteData object. No limit the number of records in a PasteData object since API version 10.
Indicates MIME types of HTML text.
Indicates MIME types of wants.
Indicates MIME types of plain text.
Indicates MIME types of URIs.
Indicates MIME type of PixelMap.
Indicates type of value.
Indicates the callback for pasteboard content changes.

节点.功能描述: get SystemPasteboard
节点.return_description: The system clipboard object

节点.功能描述: Types of scope that PasteData can be pasted.
INAPP indicates that only intra-application pasting is allowed.
LOCALDEVICE indicates that paste is allowed in any application.
CROSSDEVICE indicates that paste is allowed in any application across devices.
Enumerates the patterns allowed in the system pasteboard.
URL pattern.
Number pattern.
Email address pattern.

Defines the properties of all data records on the pasteboard, including the timestamp, data type, pasteable range, and additional data. The defined properties can be applied to the pasteboard only with the setProperty method.
additional property data. key-value pairs.
non-repeating MIME types of all records in PasteData.
the user-defined tag of a PasteData object.
a timestamp, which indicates when data is written to the system pasteboard.
Checks whether PasteData is set for local access only.
Indicates the scope of clipboard data which can be pasted. If it is not set or is incorrectly set, The default value is CrossDevice.
Paste data record.

HTML text in a record. This parameter is read-only and does not support assignment operations. To assign a value, please use ohos.pasteboard.pasteboard#createData or ohos.pasteboard.pasteboard#addEntry.
Want in a record. This parameter is read-only and does not support assignment operations. To assign a value, please use ohos.pasteboard.pasteboard#createData or ohos.pasteboard.pasteboard#addEntry.

Default MIME type of a record. This parameter is read-only and does not support assignment operations. To assign a value, please use ohos.pasteboard.pasteboard#createData or ohos.pasteboard.pasteboard#addEntry.

Plain text in a record. This parameter is read-only and does not support assignment operations. To assign a value, please use ohos.pasteboard.pasteboard#createData or ohos.pasteboard.pasteboard#addEntry.
URI in a record. This parameter is read-only and does not support assignment operations. To assign a value, please use ohos.pasteboard.pasteboard#createData or ohos.pasteboard.pasteboard#addEntry.

PixelMap in a record. This parameter is read-only and does not support assignment operations. To assign a value, please use ohos.pasteboard.pasteboard#createData or ohos.pasteboard.pasteboard#addEntry.

Custom data in a record, string indicates the MIME type of custom data, ArrayBuffer indicates the value of custom data. This parameter is read-only and does not support assignment operations. To assign a value, please use ohos.pasteboard.pasteboard#createData or ohos.pasteboard.pasteboard#addEntry.

节点.功能描述: Utilized to notify pasteboard service while reading PasteData, in this case, the service will help to preserve the context and resources
Invoked to notify pasteboard service the utilization of PasteData has completed and occupied resources can be released for further usage
Enumerates the types of file conflict options when getting data from the Pastedboard.
OVERWRITE overwrite when destUri has file with same name.
SKIP skip when destUri has file with same name.
Enumerates the types of progress indicator when getting data from the Pastedboard.
NONE getting data without system default progress indicator.
DEFALUT getting data with system default progress indicator.
Notifies progress when getting PasteData.
Progress when getting PasteData without using default system progress.
Indicates progress of getting PasteData.
Indicates the signals to process default system progress task.
Cancel the paste in progress.
Represents the get data parameters when getting PasteData from Pasteboard.
DestUri indicates the uri of dest path where copy files will be copied to sandbox of Application.
FileConflictOptions indicates fileConflictOptions when dest path has file with same name.
ProgressIndicator indicates whether to use default system progress indicator.
ProgressListener indicates progress listener when getting PasteDate without using default system progress.
Progress signal when getting PasteData with system progress indacator.
